title: Discovered: /login (200)
description: Public path /login returned HTTP 200 and served as generic HTML page
evidence:
URL: http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/login
Status: 200
Size: 1929 bytes
Content-Type: text/html;charset=UTF-8
Location: n/a

title: No TLS — target uses plain HTTP
description: The target is using plain HTTP without TLS encryption.
remediation: Enable HTTPS with a valid TLS certificate. Redirect all HTTP traffic to HTTPS.

title: SQL Injection (Error-Based) in 'userid'
description: The parameter 'userid' appears vulnerable to error-based SQL injection through a POST form submission. A HSQLDB error message was returned.
evidence:
Method: POST
Action: http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/SqlInjection/assignment5b
Payload: '
DBMS: HSQLDB
Error pattern: malformed string:
Status: 200
remediation: Use parameterized queries (prepared statements) for all database interactions. Never concatenate user input into SQL strings. Apply input validation and use an ORM where possible.

title: SQL Injection (Error-Based) in 'action_string'
description: The parameter 'action_string' appears vulnerable to error-based SQL injection through a POST form submission. A HSQLDB error message was returned.
evidence:
Method: POST
Action: http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/SqlInjection/attack10
Payload: ' AND 1=CONVERT(int,(SELECT @@version))--
DBMS: HSQLDB
Error pattern: unexpected token:
Status: 200
remediation: Use parameterized queries (prepared statements) for all database interactions. Never concatenate user input into SQL strings. Apply input validation and use an ORM where possible.

title: Reflected XSS in parameter 'query'
description: The parameter 'query' reflects user input without encoding, allowing script injection.
evidence:
Form action: http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/SqlInjection/attack5
Method: POST
Payload: <script>alert("n1GhT0wL")</script>
Payload reflected inside a JSON output field that appears to carry rendered HTML.
remediation: Implement output encoding (HTML entity escaping) on all user-controlled values. Deploy a strict Content-Security-Policy.

title: Reflected XSS in parameter 'field1'
description: The parameter 'field1' reflects user input without encoding, allowing script injection.
evidence:
URL: http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/CrossSiteScripting/attack5a?QTY1=1&QTY2=1&QTY3=1&QTY4=1&field1=%3Cscript%3Ealert%28%22n1GhT0wL%22%29%3C%2Fscript%3E&field2=111
Payload: <script>alert("n1GhT0wL")</script>
Payload reflected inside a JSON output field that appears to carry rendered HTML.
remediation: Implement output encoding (HTML entity escaping) on all user-controlled values. Deploy a strict Content-Security-Policy.

title: Missing Security Header: X-Content-Type-Options
description: X-Content-Type-Options header is missing. Browsers may MIME-sniff the response body, potentially executing untrusted content as an unexpected type.
evidence:
Header 'X-Content-Type-Options' absent in response from http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/

Observed across benchmark probes:
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/CrossSiteScripting.lesson
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/CrossSiteScripting/attack5a?QTY1=1&QTY2=1&QTY3=1&QTY4=1&field1=test&field2=111
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/SqlInjection.lesson
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/service/lessonmenu.mvc
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/start.mvc?lang=en
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/welcome.mvc

title: Missing Security Header: X-Frame-Options
description: X-Frame-Options header is missing. The page can be embedded in iframes, enabling clickjacking attacks.
evidence:
Header 'X-Frame-Options' absent in response from http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/

Observed across benchmark probes:
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/CrossSiteScripting.lesson
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/CrossSiteScripting/attack5a?QTY1=1&QTY2=1&QTY3=1&QTY4=1&field1=test&field2=111
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/SqlInjection.lesson
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/service/lessonmenu.mvc
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/start.mvc?lang=en
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/welcome.mvc
remediation: Add 'X-Frame-Options: DENY' or 'X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN'. Consider also using CSP frame-ancestors directive.

title: Missing Security Header: Content-Security-Policy
description: Content-Security-Policy header is missing. Without CSP, the application is more vulnerable to XSS and data injection attacks.
evidence:
Header 'Content-Security-Policy' absent in response from http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/

Observed across benchmark probes:
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/CrossSiteScripting.lesson
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/CrossSiteScripting/attack5a?QTY1=1&QTY2=1&QTY3=1&QTY4=1&field1=test&field2=111
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/SqlInjection.lesson
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/service/lessonmenu.mvc
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/start.mvc?lang=en
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/welcome.mvc
remediation: Implement a Content-Security-Policy header with restrictive directives. Start with 'Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'' and refine as needed.

title: Missing Security Header: Referrer-Policy
description: Referrer-Policy header is missing. Sensitive information in URLs may leak via the Referer header to third-party sites.
evidence:
Header 'Referrer-Policy' absent in response from http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/

Observed across benchmark probes:
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/CrossSiteScripting.lesson
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/CrossSiteScripting/attack5a?QTY1=1&QTY2=1&QTY3=1&QTY4=1&field1=test&field2=111
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/SqlInjection.lesson
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/service/lessonmenu.mvc
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/start.mvc?lang=en
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/welcome.mvc
remediation: Add 'Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin' or 'Referrer-Policy: no-referrer' depending on requirements.

title: Missing Security Header: Permissions-Policy
description: Permissions-Policy header is missing. Browser features like camera, microphone, and geolocation are not explicitly restricted.
evidence:
Header 'Permissions-Policy' absent in response from http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/

Observed across benchmark probes:
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/CrossSiteScripting.lesson
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/CrossSiteScripting/attack5a?QTY1=1&QTY2=1&QTY3=1&QTY4=1&field1=test&field2=111
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/SqlInjection.lesson
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/service/lessonmenu.mvc
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/start.mvc?lang=en
- http://127.0.0.1:8083/WebGoat/welcome.mvc
remediation: Add a Permissions-Policy header restricting unused browser features, e.g., 'Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()'.
